title: Unexpected Error Lost Connection
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```sql
CREATE TABLE t1(c0 TEXT(206), c1 INT, c2 BOOL);
INSERT INTO t1(c2, c1) VALUES (false, 1697950753);
CREATE VIEW v0(c0) AS SELECT NULL FROM t1;
SELECT * FROM  t1 NATURAL JOIN v0 WHERE v0.c0 NOT LIKE CONNECTION_ID();

SELECT * FROM t1; -- Error: Lost connection to MySQL server during query
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
No error.

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

```bash
| Release Version: v7.4.0-alpha
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: 32540a4a77984744dc0309d9287b05c8e9593252
Git Branch: heads/refs/tags/v7.4.0-alpha
UTC Build Time: 2023-09-27 14:33:24
GoVersion: go1.21.1
Race Enabled: false
Check Table Before Drop: false
Store: tikv |


```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c0 VARCHAR(255), c1 FLOAT, c2 DATE, c3 INT DEFAULT 0);
INSERT INTO t2(c0, c1, c2) VALUES ('test', 3.14, DATE('2023-10-01'));
CREATE VIEW v1 AS SELECT c0, c1 FROM t2 WHERE c1 > 0.0;
SELECT * FROM t2 JOIN v1 ON t2.c0 = v1.c0 WHERE v1.c0 IS NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t2 WHERE c3 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: SELECT with NATURAL JOIN on NULL view causes connection loss
